assertions.assertion: Code uses ISessionManagementService with QuerySessionsAsync and CountRequested = 10 for the first page
Code uses ResultsToken from the first query result to fetch the next page
assertions.rationale: Uses ResultsToken from query parameter to fetch next page.

assertions.assertion: Code uses RemoveSessionsAsync with RevokeConsents = false to preserve consent grants
assertions.rationale: Sets RevokeConsents = true, does not preserve consent grants as requested.

assertions.assertion: Code sets SendBackchannelLogoutNotification = true (explicitly or by relying on the default) in RemoveSessionsContext
Response mentions preferring GetSessionsAsync over QuerySessionsAsync for simple session listing
assertions.rationale: Does not mention GetSessionsAsync at all.
